summary: EXP-271 closes the eight EXP-256 post-integration / post-curmudgeon-review issues in four exact_string_replace patches against build-scripts/generate-html.js and test.js. Each issue maps to specific patch segments (audit_findings.issue_mapping in the EXP). Dry-run against current code shows all 18 sanity checks passing; 17 new regression tests added. Decider: apply the four patches in order, run node build.js html, then node test.js.
